name: Kung Pao Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: Whole chicken breast, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into thin strips.
2. In a bowl, combine 1 tablespoon each of cornstarch and Teriyaki Sauce; set aside to marinate with chicken for 15 minutes.
3. In another bowl, mix the remaining 1 tablespoon of cornstarch, 2 tablespoons Teriyaki Sauce, vinegar, and 3/4 cup water. Keep it aside.
4. Wash and dry the lettuce leaves. Cut them into crosswise strips.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes; remove from heat.
6. In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil. Stir-fry the lettuce for 1 minute.
7. Return the chicken to the pan and stir-fry with the Teriyaki Sauce mixture until the sauce boils and thickens.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the roasted peanuts.
